Section Header: Staff-only fields — a specimen-form rule references these
Field Note: Type SECRET-PATIENT-042 and SAVE. A rule on the When/Branching form references this field. Its VALUE must never appear in that form's page source (SEC-005).

Field Label: Sensitive staff note (control — referenced by NOTHING)
Field Note: Type HIV-POSITIVE-CONTROL and save. No rule references it, so it must never appear in any injected config.
A rule on the When/Branching form references sr_consent(2) (Written).

Section Header: Gating fields (these live ON this form, so they react LIVE)
Field Note: Gates most rules below. Change it and watch the fields re-validate without reloading.
Gates wb_when_cb via wb_cb(2).
Gates wb_when_radio via wb_sex (tests REDCap radio DOM).

Field Label: Validated only when Specimen type = Blood
Field Note: Blood -> validates: BLD000019 valid / BLD000010 bad. Sputum or Other -> no message at all.
Tick Yes -> validates: 57240 valid / 57241 bad. Untick -> inert.
Pick Female -> validates: 23610 valid / 23611 bad. Male -> inert.

Section Header: Branched validation — several rules, one field
Field Label: Sputum -> Verhoeff (HARD block) | Blood -> Mod 37,36 (message only)
Field Note: Type 23610 (valid Verhoeff, invalid Mod37,36) then flip the dropdown: Sputum = verified, Blood = check-character error. Per-branch enforcement: only Sputum blocks the save.
23610 verifies under Sputum; 57240 verifies under Blood/Other (the unconditional rule is the fallback).
With Sputum BOTH conditions are true -> "Validation conflict" naming both, NO validation, and the save is NOT blocked. Blood -> only the first applies (23610 valid).

Field Label: Pooled branches: Sputum 9-char Mod37,36 | Blood 11-char Luhn
Field Note: Sputum -> paste: PL000001C PL000002A . Blood -> paste: 79927398713 12345678903 . Flip and watch the chips change.
Type 57241. Expect the plain error and NO "should end in" hint.
Type 57241. Expect the error PLUS "...the ID should end in 0."

Section Header: SEC-005 — refs to a field on ANOTHER instrument
Field Label: Validated only when the staff form says ELIGIBLE
Field Note: Set sr_elig on the Staff Review form. If it equals ELIGIBLE this validates (57240 valid / 57241 bad); with SECRET-PATIENT-042 it stays inert. Then View Source: the config must contain ["const",false] and NOT the text SECRET-PATIENT-042.

Field Label: Validated only when staff Written consent is ticked
Field Note: Off-instrument CHECKBOX ref: tick Written on the Staff Review form, save, reload here -> 23610 valid / 23611 bad.

Field Label: On-form AND off-form refs in one condition
Field Note: Blood AND staff ELIGIBLE. The wb_stype half stays live (flip the dropdown); the sr_elig half is settled on the server.

Section Header: Negative configs — each must show a CONFIG ERROR, never validate
Field Label: when references a field that does not exist
Field Note: expect: "not a field in this project"
expect: "is a checkbox — reference one option as wb_cb(code)"

Field Label: checkbox ref with a code that does not exist
Field Note: expect: "has no choice code 9"
expect: "functions such as datediff( are not supported"
expect: "no eventfield prefixes"
expect: "at most ONE unconditional rule may share a field"

Field Label: two rules with the IDENTICAL condition
Field Note: expect: "the identical condition ... could never be told apart"

Field Label: a single rule and a pooled rule sharing one field
Field Note: expect: "all rules sharing a field must have the same field type"
